name: Digimarc Corporation
description: Digimarc Corporation is a pioneer and leader in product digitization, delivering digital watermarking and other identification technologies to help businesses and governments protect, identify, and track physical and digital assets. The company's Digimarc Illuminate platform enables automated identification of items, packaging, and media, facilitating supply chain visibility, brand protection, and consumer engagement. Digimarc's solutions are widely used in retail, manufacturing, media, and government sectors to combat counterfeiting, improve recycling sorting, and streamline operations.
